message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Update PractitionerRole

actor "Integrating application user" as User
participant "Integrating application" as App
participant "<FHIR API> HPI" as HPI
database "HPI Practitioner Role database" as DB

User -> App: Update PractitionerRole\nusing\nhpi-practitionerrole-id
activate App
App -> HPI: PUT<Endpoint>/PractitionerRole/[hpi-practitionerrole-id]
activate HPI
HPI -> HPI: Validate[]
HPI -> DB: Request
activate DB
DB --> HPI
deactivate DB
HPI --> App: HTTP 200 reponse
deactivate HPI
App -> User
deactivate App

@enduml
```
